## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] CI passes (syntax check, import check, all Python versions)
- [ ] New or modified tools are documented in `README.md`
- [ ] Tool count in the README header is updated (if tools were added)
- [ ] No credentials, token files, or personal data in the diff
- [ ] Tested manually against a real Garmin account (if touching tool logic)
